skill_commit_note: round-D narrow rerun: 16 evals x 2 conditions = 32 dispatches, targeting Phase 2.1-2.8 verifications per docs/plans/round-d-impl-plan.md. Skill state pinned at 7c1e966c (post-Phase-2 + Phase 3 rubric corrections + post-review SKILL.md word-budget tightening + cascade template SpikeSortingV1 -> v1 SpikeSorting fix).
spyglass_src_note: Local checkout pinned for reproducibility; HEAD at caec56bc 'Fix typo: HD5_USE_FILE_LOCKING -> HDF5_USE_FILE_LOCKING (#1576)'. Working tree clean.
model_note: Eval-runner uses parent-orchestrator's model. Subagent dispatches inherit via Task tool default.
dispatch_prompt_template: skills/spyglass/evals/dispatch_prompts.md (with_skill / without_skill templates, no-bundle-peek + no-grading-peek prohibitions enforced)

subset.rationale: Phase 4 narrow rerun per round-d-impl-plan.md: each eval verifies a specific Phase 2 edit.

_redo_note: This run was fully re-dispatched after the initial Phase 4 attempt was discarded. The redo addressed: (1) source-read permission denials hitting eval agents in the first attempt, (2) ad-hoc shell-regex grading was substituted for skill-creator's canonical grader workflow, (3) bs prompt didn't enumerate bundled-script names or sibling runs/docs-plans/auto-memory leaks. New permissions + tightened dispatch templates (with placeholders {run_id}/{skill_repo}) + per-eval grader subagents producing canonical grading.json all in place for this run.

headline_results.mcnemar_note: n=4 discordant pairs is underpowered for headline significance; narrow rerun is for per-edit verification, not global p-value

artifacts.transcripts_snapshot: transcripts_snapshot/ (TBD; must run while orchestrator session alive)

success_criteria_status._note: Skill-creator-graded results from per-eval grading.json files. ws-worse-than-bs counts: 4 (028, 089, 105, 118) — all four flagged by graders as rubric-friction, not skill content failures.

success_criteria_status.2_eval_041_ws_directness: ws 7/8 vs bs 2/8 — strongest +63pp delta in the run
success_criteria_status.3_tool_routing_invocations_028_107_108: pass (code_graph.py / source-reads observed in all four of 028, 089, 107, 108 ws transcripts)
success_criteria_status.4_eval_089_ws_uses_SpikeSortingRecording: pass — uses Selection-side restriction; failed 3 substring-shape assertions (rubric-friction, not content)
success_criteria_status.5_eval_105_ws_acknowledges_VideoFile_cam: pass — cites common_behav.py:470 / :506; failed forbidden-substring on labeled WRONG anti-pattern example
success_criteria_status.6_cascade_evals_enumerate_unaffected_bra: pass on 085 (6/8), 087 (12/14), 113 (12/12); 088 (6/8) — different question shape, handled correctly with merge-table footguns

success_criteria_status.8_eval_072_ws_acknowledges_Raw_runtime_f: pass — both ws and bs scored 14/14 (saturated tie)
success_criteria_status.9_eval_100_ws_uses_plumbing_vs_input_fra: pass — both ws and bs scored 7/7 (saturated tie)
success_criteria_status.10_no_regression_on_028_029_107: 029 tie 6/6, 107 ws 12/12 vs bs 5/12 (+58pp), 028 ws 9/13 vs bs 10/13 (-8pp; rubric-friction on FK-walk-vs-helper preference)
